nodes.label: home (/)
nodes.summary: Home page (~800 lines) — hub of the app: calendar, recording UI, live transcript, recap.

nodes.label: admin
nodes.summary: Admin dashboard server page — gates by ADMIN_EMAILS, fetches usage stats server-side, hands them to the client component.

nodes.label: admin/Client
nodes.summary: Admin dashboard client UI — tabs for usage, emissions (Green ICT), and org intelligence, with recharts visualisations.

nodes.label: auth/signin
nodes.summary: Branded sign-in landing that kicks off the Microsoft Entra OAuth flow via a server action.

nodes.label: desktop-setup
nodes.summary: Guide for capturing desktop meeting apps — leads with the Dhvani desktop app and shows a virtual-cable fallback.

nodes.label: download
nodes.summary: Download landing that resolves the latest mac/win installer URLs from the GitHub Releases API with graceful fallbacks.

nodes.label: mission
nodes.summary: Mission Control page — space-themed personal stats dashboard for the signed-in user.

nodes.label: offline
nodes.summary: Offline fallback screen shown by the service worker when the network is unavailable.

nodes.label: tasks
nodes.summary: Tasks page — full-surface view of the auto-extracted and manual task checklist.

nodes.label: transcripts
nodes.summary: Transcripts library — search, filter, open, delete, share saved transcripts.

nodes.label: upload
nodes.summary: File-upload transcription page for pre-recorded audio/video files.

nodes.label: url-transcribe
nodes.summary: URL-transcription page — paste a direct audio/video URL and transcribe it server-side.

nodes.label: shared/[token]
nodes.summary: Public shared-transcript server page — resolves a share token to a read-only transcript view.

nodes.label: shared/[token]/SharedTranscriptView
nodes.summary: Read-only client view of a shared transcript with copy/download/preview controls.

nodes.label: root layout
nodes.summary: Root layout: mounts Noto Sans, SessionProvider, TranscriptionProvider, UserProfileProvider, InstallPrompt, OrphanRecordingBanner.

nodes.label: /api/admin/analytics
nodes.summary: GET admin cross-user analytics — reads raw transcript files and computes team-level usage summary.

nodes.label: /api/admin/config
nodes.summary: GET/PUT admin service config — rate limits, monthly budget, service enabled flag, admin emails.

nodes.label: /api/admin/emissions
nodes.summary: GET admin Green ICT emissions report — IPSASB SRS-1 aligned carbon disclosure per period.

nodes.label: /api/admin/org-intelligence
nodes.summary: GET/POST admin anonymised organisational-intelligence insights (k-anon enforced).

nodes.label: /api/admin/usage
nodes.summary: GET admin aggregated usage stats (JSON or CSV) for the usage dashboard.

nodes.label: /api/ask
nodes.summary: POST chat-over-transcripts — Ask Dhvani Q&A with citations against the user's saved transcripts.

nodes.label: /api/audio/upload
nodes.summary: POST raw voice-audio chunk upload — opt-in Azure Blob archival endpoint (off by default).

nodes.label: /api/auth/[...nextauth]
nodes.summary: NextAuth v5 OAuth handlers — mounts GET and POST for sign-in, callback, signout, CSRF.

nodes.label: /api/calendar/today
nodes.summary: GET today's online meetings from Microsoft Graph /me/calendarView, cached 5 min in-process.

nodes.label: /api/calendar/upcoming
nodes.summary: GET upcoming meetings in the next N hours (for the reminder banner), 1-min cache.

nodes.label: /api/export/pdf
nodes.summary: POST transcript id → returns a printable HTML page the browser can save as PDF.

nodes.label: /api/followup
nodes.summary: POST generate a plain-text follow-up email from a transcript summary and action items.

nodes.label: /api/health
nodes.summary: GET public health probe — verifies the Azure OpenAI resource is reachable.

nodes.label: /api/me/emissions
nodes.summary: GET personal 30-day carbon footprint card for the Settings drawer.

nodes.label: /api/me/usage
nodes.summary: GET personal usage + remaining quota for the in-app indicator.

nodes.label: /api/search
nodes.summary: GET full-text search across the signed-in user's saved transcripts, with context snippets.

nodes.label: /api/storage
nodes.summary: GET which transcript storage backend is live (filesystem or Azure Blob) for the Settings drawer.

nodes.label: /api/summarize
nodes.summary: POST transcript → LLM-generated recap with action items, sentiment, keywords, task extraction.

nodes.label: /api/tasks
nodes.summary: GET/POST/DELETE task CRUD against the per-user JSONL task log.

nodes.label: /api/transcribe
nodes.summary: POST audio chunk → Azure OpenAI transcription with rate limiting and usage logging.

nodes.label: /api/transcripts/[id]
nodes.summary: GET/DELETE a single saved transcript belonging to the signed-in user.

nodes.label: /api/transcripts/[id]/share
nodes.summary: POST/DELETE to create or revoke a public share link for a transcript.

nodes.label: /api/transcripts
nodes.summary: GET list + POST save transcripts (anti-abuse caps on entries, text length, daily saves).

nodes.label: /api/url-transcribe
nodes.summary: POST remote audio/video URL → SSRF-safe fetch + transcribe + diarise.

nodes.label: /api/user/profile
nodes.summary: GET/POST user profile (role id + language/feature prefs) from onboarding.

nodes.label: /api/user/stats
nodes.summary: GET personal mission-control stats — rank, XP, badges, wellness, weekly trend.

nodes.label: /api/user/wellness
nodes.summary: GET per-user meeting wellness signal (burnout bands) for the wellness tile.

nodes.label: /api/vocabulary
nodes.summary: GET/POST/DELETE user's custom-vocabulary entries that prime Whisper's prompt.

nodes.label: ActionItems
nodes.summary: Interactive action-item checklist rendered under the AI-generated meeting summary.

nodes.label: AskDhvani
nodes.summary: Chat-over-transcripts drawer — talks to /api/ask with citation rendering.

nodes.label: AudioModeCards
nodes.summary: Large card picker for the capture mode (microphone, tab-audio, etc.) shown on the home page.

nodes.label: AudioModeSelector
nodes.summary: Compact radio-group capture-mode selector for the settings drawer and inline surfaces.

nodes.label: AudioRoutingDiagram
nodes.summary: Inline SVG diagram showing audio flow through a virtual-cable on the desktop-setup page.

nodes.label: AudioWaveform
nodes.summary: Live waveform meter — AnalyserNode-driven vertical bars keyed off frequency data.

nodes.label: CalendarToggle
nodes.summary: Calendar-preferences block (enable, reminders, lead time, auto-tag) inside Settings.

nodes.label: ControlBar
nodes.summary: Record / stop / reconnect controls plus elapsed time, chunk count, in-flight counter.

nodes.label: DemoBanner
nodes.summary: Top-of-page banner shown in demo mode to warn reviewers they are not signed in to Entra.

nodes.label: DemoSessionProvider
nodes.summary: Injects a fake NextAuth session so demo-mode pages render as if signed in.

nodes.label: DeviceSelector
nodes.summary: Microphone / virtual-cable device dropdown wired to useAudioDevices().

nodes.label: ExportMenu
nodes.summary: Export dropdown: Copy, Markdown, .docx, .md, .txt, .srt, .json — uses mode-aware filenames.

nodes.label: FollowUpEmail
nodes.summary: Follow-up email drafter — POSTs to /api/followup and lets the user copy the result.

nodes.label: InstallPrompt
nodes.summary: PWA install-prompt card shown on mobile and iOS with platform-specific instructions.

nodes.label: MeetingBanner
nodes.summary: Sticky reminder banner for an impending calendar meeting with Start-transcription CTA.

nodes.label: MeetingKeywords
nodes.summary: Pill-row of keywords extracted from a meeting summary; clicking one searches transcripts.

nodes.label: MeetingList
nodes.summary: Today's online meetings fetched from /api/calendar/today with one-tap Transcribe action.

nodes.label: MeetingSummary
nodes.summary: Recap card — calls /api/summarize, renders Markdown summary, action items, citations.

nodes.label: MissionControl
nodes.summary: Gamified stats dashboard — rank, XP bar, badges, wellness indicator.

nodes.label: NavLinks
nodes.summary: Primary navigation links (Home, Notes, Tasks, Mission, Admin) shared across page headers.

nodes.label: OnboardingGate
nodes.summary: Renders the OnboardingWizard on first sign-in when the user has no saved profile.

nodes.label: OnboardingWizard
nodes.summary: Multi-step modal for picking role / sector / preferred languages during onboarding.

nodes.label: OrgInsightsOptIn
nodes.summary: Localstorage-backed opt-in toggle for contributing anonymised org insights.

nodes.label: OrphanRecordingBanner
nodes.summary: Crash-recovery banner — surfaces OPFS sessions still marked recording and offers Recover/Discard.

nodes.label: RecordingBadge
nodes.summary: Fixed-position recording-in-progress pill shown on every page while capture is active.

nodes.label: SentimentBadge
nodes.summary: Coloured pill showing overall meeting sentiment from the LLM summary.

nodes.label: SettingsDrawer
nodes.summary: Slide-out settings panel — mic, language, mode, theme, calendar, storage, carbon.

nodes.label: ShareModal
nodes.summary: Modal to create or revoke a public-share link for a transcript with TTL choice.

nodes.label: SpeakerStats
nodes.summary: Per-speaker talk-time breakdown bar chart below the transcript.

nodes.label: Switch
nodes.summary: Reusable ITU-branded two-state toggle switch used across settings surfaces.

nodes.label: TaskChecklist
nodes.summary: Task checklist component — list, mark-done, priority colour coding, manual add.

nodes.label: TestAudio
nodes.summary: Short-capture test button to verify a chosen mic/mode round-trips through the transcriber.

nodes.label: TranscriptPanel
nodes.summary: Live transcript panel — renders entries, auto-scroll, in-transcript search, speaker rename, pinning.

nodes.label: TranscriptSearch
nodes.summary: Library-wide search box that queries /api/search and renders hit cards with context.

nodes.label: VocabularyManager
nodes.summary: Custom-vocabulary CRUD UI — terms and definitions that prime the transcriber's prompt.

nodes.label: WellnessIndicator
nodes.summary: Compact meeting-wellness tile (signal strength) shown on home and /mission.

nodes.label: EmissionsDashboard
nodes.summary: Admin Green ICT dashboard — IPSASB SRS-1 aligned carbon report with charts.

nodes.label: OrgIntelligence
nodes.summary: Admin anonymised organisational-intelligence insights dashboard.

nodes.label: useAudioCapture
nodes.summary: Cross-mode audio capture — MediaRecorder rotation, OPFS persistence, wake lock, mic/tab/virtual-cable/electron.

nodes.label: useAudioDevices
nodes.summary: Enumerate audio input devices (after priming mic permission via getUserMedia).

nodes.label: useCalendarPrefs
nodes.summary: Localstorage-backed calendar preferences (show meetings, reminders, lead time, auto-tag).

nodes.label: useKeyboardShortcuts
nodes.summary: Global keyboard shortcuts — Cmd+R record, Cmd+E export, Cmd+, settings, Cmd+/ search.

nodes.label: useMeetingReminders
nodes.summary: Polls /api/calendar/upcoming and fires in-app reminder banners with dismissal memory.

nodes.label: useMode
nodes.summary: React subscription to the Personal/Power mode primitive with a cross-component change event.

nodes.label: useTheme
nodes.summary: React subscription to the light/dark/system theme choice with cross-tab sync.

nodes.label: useTranscriptStore
nodes.summary: Client-side transcript state — entries, auto-save every 30s, resume, cross-slot localStorage sharding.

nodes.label: useTranscription
nodes.summary: Transcription pipeline — chunk queue, concurrency, exponential-backoff silent retries, delete-on-success.

nodes.label: useWakeLock
nodes.summary: Acquire/release a screen wake-lock with visibility-change re-acquisition.

nodes.label: TranscriptionContext
nodes.summary: Global transcription context — audio capture, transcript store, pipeline shared across pages.

nodes.label: UserProfileContext
nodes.summary: Global user-profile context — needsOnboarding flag, role, language/feature prefs.

nodes.label: audioPersistence
nodes.summary: OPFS-backed chunk persistence with IndexedDB shadow log and orphan-session recovery API.

nodes.label: audioUtils
nodes.summary: Audio helpers — elapsed formatter, SRT timestamp, pickSupportedMimeType, blobToFile.

nodes.label: auth
nodes.summary: NextAuth v5 config for Microsoft Entra — JWT with refresh, Graph token capture, server helpers.

nodes.label: azureBlobAudio
nodes.summary: Azure Blob client for voice-audio archival (manifest + webm chunks) — opt-in server-side.

nodes.label: azureBlobStorage
nodes.summary: Azure Blob client for transcript JSON — saveTranscript, listTranscripts, getTranscript, deleteTranscript.

nodes.label: azureErrorMessages
nodes.summary: Maps raw Azure / network errors to user-friendly titles, hints, and action links.

nodes.label: calendar
nodes.summary: Microsoft Graph calendar types + helpers — Meeting shape, fromGraphEvent, cache, error handler.

nodes.label: config
nodes.summary: Centralised runtime config derived from env vars — AI provider, storage, calendar, feature flags.

nodes.label: constants
nodes.summary: Shared constants — chunk duration, concurrency, bitrate, pricing, TranscriptEntry type, speaker colors.

nodes.label: demoMode
nodes.summary: Demo-mode flag + fixture data (demo user, demo meetings) for env review without SSO.

nodes.label: docxExport
nodes.summary: Mode-aware .docx exporter — Personal minimal template, Power ITU-branded template.

nodes.label: events
nodes.summary: In-process event bus for Dhvani signals (transcription events, notifications webhook hook).

nodes.label: exportUtils
nodes.summary: Transcript renderers — toTxt, toMarkdown, toSrt, toJson, buildFilename, downloadText.

nodes.label: gamification
nodes.summary: Gamification engine — ranks, XP, badges, mission-stats computed from usage + tasks.

nodes.label: greenIct
nodes.summary: Green-ICT carbon accounting — One-Token Model + IPSASB SRS-1 emissions report builder.

nodes.label: meetingWellness
nodes.summary: Meeting wellness monitor — flags weeks approaching burnout thresholds.

nodes.label: mode
nodes.summary: Personal / Power mode primitive — localStorage-backed with COPY map and change-event emitter.

nodes.label: openai
nodes.summary: Azure OpenAI client factories — createOpenAIClient (whisper) + createChatOpenAIClient (gpt-4.1-mini).

nodes.label: orgIntelligence
nodes.summary: Anonymised org-intelligence log — k-anonymity, opt-in, day-rounded timestamps, redacted records.

nodes.label: rateLimiter
nodes.summary: Per-user hour/day caps + org-wide monthly budget cap; service-enabled master switch.

nodes.label: roleProfiles
nodes.summary: ITU role profiles — sector, department, vocabulary, system-prompt instruction block per role.

nodes.label: security
nodes.summary: Security helpers — sanitisePathSegment, ensureWithinDir, logSecurityEvent, safe regex escaping.

nodes.label: shareStorage
nodes.summary: Transcript-share-link store — create, get, delete tokens with optional TTL and auth gate.

nodes.label: taskManager
nodes.summary: Per-user JSONL task log — CRUD, priority/status enums, LLM task extraction helper.

nodes.label: theme
nodes.summary: ITU brand palette + supporting color tokens (mirrors tailwind.config.ts for JS consumers).

nodes.label: themeMode
nodes.summary: Light/dark/system theme primitive — stored + applied via html[data-theme] attribute.

nodes.label: transcriptStorage
nodes.summary: Transcript persistence facade — picks filesystem or Azure Blob backend based on env.

nodes.label: urlFetch
nodes.summary: SSRF-safe remote-media fetcher — classify URL, validate host, stream into bounded buffer.

nodes.label: usageAggregates
nodes.summary: Pure aggregator over the usage log — UsageStats shape for admin dashboard + CSV export.

nodes.label: usageLogger
nodes.summary: Append-only JSONL usage log — logUsage, readAllUsage, costFromSeconds.

nodes.label: userProfileStorage
nodes.summary: Per-user JSON profile store — readUserProfile, writeUserProfile.

nodes.label: providers/ai
nodes.summary: AIProvider contract — TranscriptionResult, ChatResult shapes shared by implementations.

nodes.label: providers/azure-openai
nodes.summary: Azure OpenAI implementation of AIProvider — wraps createOpenAIClient with verbose_json fallback.

nodes.label: providers/index
nodes.summary: Provider factory — getAIProvider() switches on AI_PROVIDER env.

nodes.label: electron/main
nodes.summary: Electron main process — creates BrowserWindow, system tray, shortcuts, optional demo Next.js fork.

nodes.label: electron/preload
nodes.summary: Electron preload — narrow contextBridge API (window.electronAPI) for start/stop and chunk listeners.

nodes.label: middleware
nodes.summary: Route middleware — enforces NextAuth session on every page except an allow-list of public prefixes.

nodes.label: ARCHITECTURE.md
nodes.summary: Architecture overview of Dhvani — pipelines, data flows, design choices.

nodes.label: AZURE_BLOB_AUDIO_SETUP.md
nodes.summary: Setup guide for enabling opt-in Azure Blob voice-audio archival.

nodes.label: CIO_ISD_HANDOVER.md
nodes.summary: CIO/ISD handover brief covering scaling, production readiness, ownership transfer.

nodes.label: DEPLOY.md
nodes.summary: Deployment instructions for Dhvani on Azure Web App and the desktop build.

nodes.label: E2E_TESTING_PROMPT.md
nodes.summary: Full end-to-end QA script for a desktop GUI agent to exercise the product.

nodes.label: ENTRA_SETUP.md
nodes.summary: Microsoft Entra (Azure AD) tenant + app-registration setup walkthrough.

nodes.label: ROADMAP.md
nodes.summary: 12-month product roadmap once Dhvani graduates from the Innovation Hub.

nodes.label: SECURITY.md
nodes.summary: Security posture — auth, rate limiting, SSRF, storage isolation, threat model notes.

nodes.label: STANDALONE_APPS_SPLIT.md
nodes.summary: Mega-prompt for splitting Dhvani into discrete apps if leadership chooses that shape.

nodes.label: STRATEGIC_PLAN.md
nodes.summary: Strategic plan document for Dhvani's positioning inside ITU.

nodes.label: deployment.md
nodes.summary: Legacy deployment notes (superseded by DEPLOY.md).

nodes.label: HANDOFF.md
nodes.summary: Single-shot session handoff doc — paste at the start of a new chat for full context.

nodes.label: README.md
nodes.summary: Project README — overview, run/verify, features, status.

nodes.label: CONTRIBUTING.md
nodes.summary: Contributing guide — coding conventions, PR expectations, setup.

nodes.label: LICENSE
nodes.summary: MIT (or equivalent) license text.

nodes.label: Azure OpenAI — gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize
nodes.summary: Azure OpenAI diarisation deployment (SWC region) used for audio transcription.

nodes.label: Azure OpenAI — gpt-4.1-mini
nodes.summary: Azure OpenAI chat deployment (EUW region) used for summary, ask, follow-up, tasks.

nodes.label: Azure Blob Storage
nodes.summary: Azure Blob Storage — transcripts and (opt-in) raw voice audio containers.

nodes.label: Microsoft Entra ID
nodes.summary: Microsoft Entra (Azure AD) — OAuth / OIDC identity provider for SSO.

nodes.label: Microsoft Graph (Calendar)
nodes.summary: Microsoft Graph /me/calendarView — pulls the user's online meetings.

nodes.label: GitHub Releases API
nodes.summary: api.github.com Releases endpoint — resolves latest desktop installer URLs.

nodes.label: lucide-react
nodes.summary: lucide-react icon set — line icons used across the UI.

nodes.label: OPFS (browser)
nodes.summary: Origin Private File System — crash-safe chunk blobs under /recordings/<sessionId>/.

nodes.label: IndexedDB (browser)
nodes.summary: IndexedDB shadow log of chunk metadata — second source of truth for crash recovery.

nodes.label: localStorage (browser)
nodes.summary: Browser localStorage — user preferences (mode, theme, calendar, dismissed reminders).

nodes.label: Local filesystem — ./data/transcripts
nodes.summary: Default transcript store under ./data/transcripts/<userId>/<id>.json (wiped on redeploy).

nodes.label: Local filesystem — usage log
nodes.summary: Append-only JSONL usage log at ./data/usage-log.jsonl.

nodes.label: Local filesystem — tasks + shares + vocab
nodes.summary: Per-user JSONL/JSON files for tasks, shares, custom vocabulary under ./data.

nodes.label: Local filesystem — org-insights log
nodes.summary: Anonymised org-insights JSONL log (opt-in) at ./data/org-insights.jsonl.

nodes.label: Local filesystem — user profiles
nodes.summary: Per-user JSON profile store under ./data/users/.

nodes.label: service worker (sw.js)
nodes.summary: Service worker — offline cache + install banner bootstrap.
